MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. VIVIAN LEUNG LERCHE, TEL. NO. 1-415-680-5731 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
EDSEL SIMPLICIANO, TEL. NO. 1-415-490-7528, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. Hearing On Claim Of Exemption of Defendant Edsel T. Simpliciano is Granted. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 =302/hk

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-22-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq. (415-680-5731) specially appearing for Plaintiff.
Edsel Simpliciano (415-490-7528) for Defendant in Pro Per.

RULING - The matter is discussed. The Court informs the Defendant an incorrect form was filled out and is referred to the Sheriff's office and the Justice and Diversity's office re: filling out the correct bank account levy form. The Court rules as follows:

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is continued to July 6, 2017 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. Notice waived. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/RBU)
